title: How many dissenting votes at the next Fed meeting? (zero)

current.lean_note: 46pt gap vs a liquid market without high confidence — more likely my error than edge
current.rationale_summary: April+May FOMC were 8-4 (4 dissents each); implies continued dissent (zero-dissents unlikely). But liquid market prices 70% zero-dissents -> 46-pt gap means I likely miss a June development; record but NONE.

history.lean_note: low confidence — estimate too uncertain to fade the market
history.rationale_summary: April's anomalous 4-dissent meeting and dove Miran's likely cut-dissent against a hold make at least one dissent more probable than the market's 64% zero-dissent pricing, though a new-chair unity effect tempers this.
reference_classes: dissent rate in divided FOMC ~50% of meetings
